title: nepeta subincisa var. subincisa
intro: Nepeta subincisa var. subincisa, also known as Chinese catmint, is a perennial herb native to China and Japan. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nepeta subincisa var. subincisa include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving menstrual cramps, and soothing digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
